top_signals.title: Japan and Philippines to discuss surface-to-ship missile exports
top_signals.summary: Type-88 surface-to-ship guided missiles of Japan's Ground Self-Defense Force are expected to be up for consideration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Israel plants flag on medieval castle and pushes Lebanon ground operation
top_signals.summary: Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz said troops had captured the historic strongpoint, which commands sweeping views of south Lebanon, as they expanded their ground operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
